task_text: Prepare a comprehensive project health briefing for NovaBridge's leadership team. The briefing should cover: current progress, key risks, upcoming Q3 commitments, and any issues that need leadership attention. Save it as project_health_briefing.txt.

Project Helios — Weekly Status Update
Week of 2026-07-06

Overall: ON TRACK (minor risks)

Milestone Progress:
- Data ingestion module: 85% complete
- API gateway: 100% complete (delivered)
- Client dashboard: 60% complete
- Integration testing: 40% complete

Sprint 14 Goals:
- Complete dashboard module v1
- Resolve data format inconsistencies (Blocker #1)
- Begin UAT preparation

Open Blockers:
1. Meridian source data contains inconsistent date formats (ISO 8601 vs. MM/DD/YYYY).
   Dev team awaiting clarification from Meridian IT. Estimated delay: 2-3 days.
2. Third-party mapping library (GeoSync v2.1) license renewal pending. Legal reviewing.
   Target resolution: 2026-07-14.

Next milestone: Integration Test Sign-off — target 2026-07-25

Project Helios — Risk Register
Last reviewed: 2026-07-07 | Owner: Sarah Chen (PM)

ID    Risk Description                             Likelihood  Impact  Score  Mitigation Owner    Status
----  -------------------------------------------  ----------  ------  -----  ------------------  --------
R-01  Meridian source data quality issues           High        High    9      Amir Hassan         Active — date format blocker confirmed in sprint 14
R-02  GeoSync license not renewed before demo       Medium      High    6      Raj Patel           Active — legal review in progress, due 2026-07-14
R-03  Dashboard performance on large datasets       Medium      High    6      Derek Okafor        Active — benchmark task HEL-247 not yet started
R-04  UAT timeline slippage                        High        Medium  6      Sarah Chen          Active — 1-week extension already consumed
R-05  Key person dependency: Derek Okafor           Low         High    3      Sarah Chen          Monitored — no backup tech lead identified
R-06  Meridian IT environment access delays        Medium      Medium  4      Nadia Petrov        Active — awaiting IT infrastructure diagram
R-07  Scope creep from Meridian feature requests   Low         Medium  2      Raj Patel           Monitored — 3 informal requests logged, not yet escalated
R-08  Cloud cost overrun                           Low         Low     1      Nadia Petrov        Monitored
R-09  Third-party API deprecation (non-GeoSync)    Very Low    Medium  1      Olivia Brooks       Monitored

Project Helios — Q3 Roadmap
INTERNAL DRAFT — Not for client distribution
Last updated: 2026-07-06

Q3 2026 Priorities:

1. COMPLETE SYSTEM INTEGRATION (July)
   - Finalize data ingestion module (target: 2026-07-18)
   - Complete client dashboard v1 (target: 2026-07-22)
   - Integration test sign-off (target: 2026-07-25)

2. PRODUCT DEMO FOR MERIDIAN (July 25)
   - Live data ingestion demonstration using Meridian sample data
   - End-to-end pipeline walkthrough
   - Dashboard visualization with real data (per contract Section 9.3)

3. USER ACCEPTANCE TESTING — MERIDIAN GROUP (August 17-28)
   - Deploy to UAT environment
   - Support Meridian user testing sessions
   - Address UAT feedback (budget: 2 sprints)

4. PERFORMANCE HARDENING (August-September)
   - Dashboard load time target: <2 seconds for 100k records
   - Ingestion throughput benchmarking (target: 500k records/min sustained)
   - External security penetration test (vendor TBD)

5. LAUNCH PREPARATION (September)
   - Production environment setup and runbook documentation
   - Hypercare plan finalization (30-day post-launch model)
   - Final client training sessions

Target launch date: 2026-10-01
Key risk: UAT slippage of >2 weeks pushes launch into Q4, triggering Section 7.1 penalty review.

Proposed Q3 feature additions (subject to change control approval):
- Scheduled ingestion jobs (cron-based triggers)
- Email alerting for pipeline failures
- Self-service mapping rule editor (deferred from Q2)

Project Helios — Q2 Deliverables Checklist

[DONE]      Requirements documentation v1.0
[DONE]      System architecture design
[DONE]      API gateway implementation
[DONE]      Development environment setup
[DONE]      Data schema finalization
[IN-PROGRESS] Data ingestion module (target: 2026-07-18)
[IN-PROGRESS] Client dashboard v1 (target: 2026-07-22)
[OVERDUE]   Integration test suite setup (was due 2026-06-30; rescheduled to 2026-07-20)
[OVERDUE]   UAT environment provisioning (was due 2026-07-01; blocked by Meridian IT access)
[OVERDUE]   Performance benchmarking report (was due 2026-07-05; owner: Derek Okafor)

Meeting Notes: Project Helios / Meridian Group Sync
Date: 2026-07-08
Attendees: Sarah Chen (NovaBridge PM), Derek Okafor (NovaBridge Tech Lead),
           Priya Kapoor (Meridian IT Lead), James Whitfield (Meridian Project Sponsor)

Decisions:
1. Demo date confirmed: 2026-07-25 (product demo for Meridian stakeholders)
2. Meridian will provide clean sample dataset by 2026-07-15 to unblock date format issue
3. UAT period extended by 1 week (now Aug 17-28)

Action Items:
- NovaBridge: Resolve GeoSync license before demo (owner: Derek Okafor, due 2026-07-14)
- NovaBridge: Send draft demo agenda to Meridian by 2026-07-18 (owner: Sarah Chen)
- Meridian: Share IT infrastructure diagram for integration environment setup
  (owner: Priya Kapoor, due 2026-07-12)

Notes:
- James Whitfield emphasized that the demo must include live data ingestion, not mock data.
- Concern raised about dashboard load times on large datasets. Derek to benchmark before demo.
- Priya Kapoor confirmed Meridian IT will provision UAT environment access by 2026-07-19.

Project Helios — QA Testing Log: Sprint 14
QA Engineer: Kenji Watanabe
Period: 2026-07-07 to 2026-07-11 (ongoing)

=== Test Suite: Authentication Flows ===
TC-401  OAuth token issuance              PASS
TC-402  Token refresh                     PASS
TC-403  Expired token rejection           PASS
TC-404  Invalid scope rejection           PASS
Suite result: 4/4 PASS

=== Test Suite: Data Pipeline — Batch Ingestion ===
TC-501  CSV ingestion (10k records)                  PASS
TC-502  JSON ingestion (10k records)                 PASS
TC-503  XML ingestion (5k records)                   PASS
TC-504  Date normalization (ISO 8601 input)          PASS
TC-505  Date normalization (MM/DD/YYYY input)        FAIL  [OPEN — HEL-D-014]
TC-506  Duplicate record detection                   PASS
TC-507  Large file ingestion (500k records)          FAIL  [OPEN — HEL-D-015]
Suite result: 5/7 PASS, 2 FAIL

=== Test Suite: Dashboard ===
TC-601  Data table rendering (10k records)           PASS
TC-602  Chart rendering — line chart                 IN PROGRESS
TC-603  Chart rendering — bar chart                  NOT RUN
TC-604  Load time benchmark (100k records)           NOT RUN
Suite result: 1/4 complete

=== Open Defects ===
HEL-D-014  Date normalization fails for MM/DD/YYYY input format.
           Affects ~40% of Meridian source data. Severity: HIGH.
           Owner: Amir Hassan. Blocked pending Meridian sample data (due 2026-07-15).

HEL-D-015  Large file ingestion (>200k records) causes memory overflow.
           Pipeline crashes at approximately 210k record mark. Severity: HIGH.
           Owner: Amir Hassan. Root cause under investigation.

Overall sprint 14 test status: 10/15 test cases executed, 2 FAIL (open), 3 not yet run.

HEL-245  | Integration test suite: data pipeline     | Kenji Watanabe    | 5      | 2026-07-18 | In Progress
HEL-246  | UAT environment: server provisioning      | Nadia Petrov      | 8      | 2026-07-16 | At Risk
HEL-247  | Performance benchmark: dashboard load     | Derek Okafor      | 3      | 2026-07-18 | Not Started
HEL-248  | GeoSync license renewal coordination      | Raj Patel         | 2      | 2026-07-14 | In Progress

content.text: I’ve gathered all the relevant project data — now I’ll draft the comprehensive health briefing for leadership.

input.content:
NovaBridge - Project Helios - Project Health Briefing
Date: July 2026 (Week of 2026-07-06 to 2026-07-08)
Prepared for: Leadership Team
Project Manager: Sarah Chen
Technical Lead: Derek Okafor

====================================================================
EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
====================================================================
Overall Status: ON TRACK (minor risks)

Project Helios is progressing toward July integration milestones with core
infrastructure complete. API gateway is delivered at 100%. Data ingestion (85%)
and client dashboard (60%) are in progress. Integration testing is at 40%.

Two active blockers and three overdue Q2 deliverables require attention.
The product demo for Meridian on July 25 remains the immediate critical date.
UAT buffer of 1 week has already been consumed; further slippage >2 weeks
risks pushing launch past 2026-10-01 and triggering Section 7.1 penalty review.

====================================================================
1. CURRENT PROGRESS
====================================================================

A. Milestone Progress (per status update 2026-07-06):
   - Data ingestion module: 85% complete - target 2026-07-18
   - API gateway: 100% complete (delivered)
   - Client dashboard: 60% complete - target v1 2026-07-22
   - Integration testing: 40% complete - sign-off target 2026-07-25

B. Sprint 14 (2026-07-07 to 2026-07-18) Goals:
   - Complete dashboard module v1
   - Resolve data format inconsistencies (Blocker #1)
   - Begin UAT preparation

   Task Status (8 tasks):
   - Done: 1 (HEL-244 Auth flows)
   - In Progress: 4 (HEL-241 data table, HEL-242 chart rendering,
     HEL-245 data pipeline tests, HEL-248 GeoSync license)
   - Blocked: 1 (HEL-243 date format normalization - awaiting Meridian sample)
   - At Risk: 1 (HEL-246 UAT server provisioning - blocked by Meridian IT)
   - Not Started: 1 (HEL-247 Performance benchmark: dashboard load - owner Derek Okafor)

C. Q2 Deliverables Checklist:
   DONE: Requirements doc v1.0, System architecture, API gateway,
         Dev environment, Data schema finalization
   IN-PROGRESS: Data ingestion module, Client dashboard v1
   OVERDUE:
     - Integration test suite setup (due 2026-06-30, rescheduled to 2026-07-20)
     - UAT environment provisioning (due 2026-07-01, blocked by Meridian IT access)
     - Performance benchmarking report (due 2026-07-05, owner: Derek Okafor)

D. QA Status - Sprint 14 Testing Log (QA: Kenji Watanabe):
   - Auth Flows: 4/4 PASS
   - Data Pipeline Batch Ingestion: 5/7 PASS, 2 FAIL
     * TC-505 Date normalization MM/DD/YYYY - FAIL (HEL-D-014) - ~40% of Meridian data affected
     * TC-507 Large file ingestion 500k records - FAIL (HEL-D-015) - memory overflow at ~210k
   - Dashboard: 1/4 complete, 1 IN PROGRESS, 2 NOT RUN including load benchmark
   Overall: 10/15 cases executed, 2 open HIGH severity defects

E. Recent Decisions (Meridian Sync 2026-07-08):
   - Demo date locked: 2026-07-25, must include LIVE data ingestion (not mock) per sponsor James Whitfield
   - Meridian to provide clean sample dataset by 2026-07-15 to unblock date issue
   - UAT extended by 1 week to Aug 17-28
   - Meridian IT to provision UAT access by 2026-07-19 and share infra diagram by 2026-07-12 (owner: Priya Kapoor)

====================================================================
2. KEY RISKS (Risk Register last reviewed 2026-07-07)
====================================================================

HIGH PRIORITY (Active):
R-01 Meridian source data quality - Likelihood High / Impact High / Score 9
     Active - date format blocker confirmed (ISO 8601 vs MM/DD/YYYY)
     Owner: Amir Hassan | Mitigation: Awaiting clean sample 2026-07-15

R-02 GeoSync license not renewed before demo - Medium / High / Score 6
     Active - legal review in progress, due 2026-07-14
     Owner: Raj Patel (task HEL-248) & Derek Okafor per meeting notes
     Legal action required.

R-03 Dashboard performance on large datasets - Medium / High / Score 6
     Active - benchmark HEL-247 not yet started, concern raised by Meridian
     Owner: Derek Okafor

R-04 UAT timeline slippage - High / Medium / Score 6
     Active - 1-week extension already consumed
     Owner: Sarah Chen

MEDIUM PRIORITY:
R-06 Meridian IT environment access delays - Medium / Medium / Score 4
     Active - blocking HEL-246 UAT provisioning
     Owner: Nadia Petrov - awaiting IT infrastructure diagram

MONITORED (Lower Score but Relevant):
R-05 Key person dependency: Derek Okafor - Low / High / Score 3
     No backup tech lead identified. Derek owns critical path items including
     benchmark and GeoSync resolution.

R-07 Scope creep from Meridian - Low / Medium / Score 2 - 3 informal requests logged
R-08 Cloud cost overrun - Low / Low / Score 1
R-09 Third-party API deprecation - Very Low / Medium / Score 1

====================================================================
3. UPCOMING Q3 COMMITMENTS (Roadmap Draft 2026-07-06 - INTERNAL)
====================================================================

JULY - System Integration Close:
1. Finalize data ingestion module - target 2026-07-18
2. Complete client dashboard v1 - target 2026-07-22
3. Integration test sign-off - target 2026-07-25
4. PRODUCT DEMO FOR MERIDIAN - July 25
   Requirements: Live ingestion with Meridian sample data, end-to-end
   pipeline walkthrough, dashboard with real data (per contract Section 9.3)

AUGUST - UAT & Hardening:
5. USER ACCEPTANCE TESTING - Meridian Group - August 17-28
   Deploy to UAT env, support testing sessions, address feedback (2 sprints budgeted)
6. Performance Hardening (Aug-Sep)
   - Dashboard load target: <2 sec for 100k records
   - Ingestion throughput: 500k records/min sustained
   - External security pen test (vendor TBD)

SEPTEMBER - Launch Prep:
7. Production env setup and runbook
8. Hypercare plan finalization (30-day model)
9. Final client training

Target Launch: 2026-10-01
Note: >2 weeks UAT slippage pushes to Q4 and triggers Section 7.1 penalty review

Proposed Q3 additions (pending change control):
- Scheduled ingestion jobs (cron)
- Email alerting for pipeline failures
- Self-service mapping rule editor (deferred from Q2)

====================================================================
4. ISSUES REQUIRING LEADERSHIP ATTENTION
====================================================================

IMMEDIATE (Next 7 Days):

1. GeoSync v2.1 License Renewal - Due 2026-07-14
   Impact: Demo on 2026-07-25 cannot proceed without it.
   Action: Escalate with Legal to ensure renewal before deadline.
   Owners: Raj Patel, Derek Okafor

2. Critical Defect HEL-D-015 - Large file memory overflow at 210k records
   Severity HIGH - crashes pipeline. Directly conflicts with Q3 throughput
   target of 500k/min and may block demo if Meridian sample is large.
   Action: Allocate additional backend capacity (Amir Hassan investigating)
   Leadership to assess if architecture change needed.

3. Meridian Data Dependency - Blocker #1 / HEL-D-014
   40% of Meridian source data failing due to MM/DD/YYYY format.
   Meridian committed to clean sample by 2026-07-15. If delayed, ingestion
   module target 2026-07-18 at risk.
   Action: PM to maintain daily follow-up; prepare contingency to demo with
   filtered ISO 8601 subset if needed (requires sponsor approval).

SHORT-TERM (Next 2-3 Weeks):

4. Overdue Q2 Deliverables Piling Upstream
   - Integration test suite setup (new target 2026-07-20) - resource gap
   - UAT environment provisioning - blocked by Meridian IT (needs 2026-07-19)
   - Performance benchmarking report overdue since 2026-07-05 (Derek Okafor)
   Leadership ask: Confirm prioritization - benchmark work (HEL-247) still
   Not Started despite dashboard load concerns from Meridian.

5. Key Person Risk - Derek Okafor
   Derek is sole owner of performance benchmark, co-owner of GeoSync fix,
   and tech lead for demo concerns. No backup identified. Single point of
   failure during critical July window.

6. Demo Risk - Live Data Requirement
   Meridian sponsor explicitly stated demo must be live ingestion, not mock.
   Combined with data quality (R-01) and memory overflow (HEL-D-015) defects,
   risk of demo failure is elevated. Recommend leadership review of fallback plan.

STRATEGIC:

7. UAT Buffer Consumed, Launch Date at Risk
   UAT already extended 1 week. Roadmap explicitly notes >2 weeks further
   slippage triggers penalty review under contract Section 7.1 and pushes
   launch to Q4 (2026-10-01 target). Current integration test sign-off
   (2026-07-25) is on same day as demo - tight coupling.

8. Scope Creep Monitoring
   3 informal Meridian feature requests logged. With Q3 feature additions
   proposed (scheduled jobs, alerting, self-service editor), need strict
   change control to protect launch date.

====================================================================
RECOMMENDED LEADERSHIP ACTIONS
====================================================================
- Escalate GeoSync license with Legal (daily check-in until 2026-07-14)
- Approve contingency staffing for HEL-D-015 if not resolved by 2026-07-16
- Review demo agenda and approve live-data fallback criteria before 2026-07-18
- Assign backup tech lead to shadow Derek Okafor for July
- Review contract Section 7.1 and 9.3 obligations ahead of July 25 demo
- Schedule leadership pre-demo readiness check on 2026-07-23

====================================================================
END OF BRIEFING
====================================================================

content.text:
Comprehensive project health briefing has been prepared and saved as **project_health_briefing.txt**.

The briefing covers:

**1. Current Progress:** Milestone status (API gateway 100%, ingestion 85%, dashboard 60%, testing 40%), Sprint 14 tasks, Q2 deliverables (2 in-progress, 3 overdue), QA results (10/15 tests, 2 HIGH defects: date normalization HEL-D-014 and memory overflow HEL-D-015), and recent Meridian decisions.

**2. Key Risks:** 9 risks from risk register detailed with scores, with R-01 (data quality, Score 9), R-02 (GeoSync license), R-03 (dashboard performance), and R-04 (UAT slippage) as top active risks.

**3. Q3 Commitments:** July integration close & July 25 live demo (Section 9.3), Aug 17-28 UAT, performance hardening targets (<2s load, 500k/min), and Sep launch prep targeting Oct 1 launch with Section 7.1 penalty risk noted.

**4. Leadership Attention:** 8 issues flagged as Immediate (GeoSync license due 7/14, memory overflow defect, Meridian data dependency), Short-term (overdue deliverables, key-person dependency on Derek Okafor, live-data demo risk), and Strategic (UAT buffer consumed, scope creep).

All data sourced from project_helios_status.txt, risk_register.txt, q3_roadmap_draft.txt, q2_deliverables_checklist.txt, meeting_notes_2026_07_08.txt, helios_testing_log_sprint14.txt, and sprint_14_task_assignments.txt.
